name: No Release Without Authenticated Approval
description: External-facing release or dispatch may occur only after an authenticated approval event whose scope covers the intended action (Szpruch capability C4: Gated Release & Dispatch).
rationale: FIX Approval & Release Gating + Szpruch C4. Release with conversational or implicit approval, or approval whose scope does not cover the action, is a Red halt.

examples.fails: Release whose approval scope does not cover the dispatched action

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
